title: Vientiane World+
description: Vientiane World Integration Package+, a pursuit of ultimate architecture and simulation in my world.It is an upgraded version of the Vientiane world integration package, adding more modules and some material packages.
body:
这是万象世界整合包+，它主打建筑和模拟，它拥有着很多有趣的模组！它拥有优化类模组(例如：钠 和 锂)，建组类模组（例如：迷上城建 和 Connected Glass），模拟类模组（例如：我的世界铁路 和 机械动力）和一些有趣的模组（例如：是，史蒂夫模型 和 喜报）等，它加大了玩家游玩的乐趣，它也是新手游玩建筑和模拟类模组的入门整合包的不二之选！我相信它对你来说会十分有趣！

(translated by machine) This is the Vientiane world integration Pack+, which focuses on architecture and simulation. It has many interesting modules! It has optimized modules (e.g. Sodium and Lithium), built-up modules (e.g. Mishang Urban Construction and Connected glass), simulation modules (e.g. Minecraft Transit Railway and Create) and some interesting modules (e.g. yes, Steve model and Xibao). It increases the fun of players' playing. It is also the best choice for novices to play architecture and simulation modules! I believe it will be very interesting for you!
